Never meet a pen pal in person unless a grown-up is with you." Looking at the answer choices: A) Keep all the pen pal's letters and e-mails in private B) Meet him/her with one of your classmates C) Be sure you are safe at any time D) Share whatever you experience with him/her The passage specifically says to share all letters and emails with your parents so they know you are safe.
